command:
echo '=== SOURCE (snapshot) ==='
[ -e '/btrfs/volume1/mac/#snapshot/a.txt' ] || { echo "ERROR: source does not exist"; exit 1; }
echo '=== DESTINATION ==='
ls -la '/btrfs/volume1/mac/a.txt' 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS — refusing to overwrite" && exit 1 || echo "(does not exist — safe to restore)"
echo '=== RESTORING ==='
cp -a '/btrfs/volume1/mac/#snapshot/a.txt' '/btrfs/volume1/mac/a.txt' 2>&1 || { echo "FAILED to restore"; exit 1; }
echo '=== VERIFY ==='
ls -la '/btrfs/volume1/mac/a.txt' 2>&1
